Video.summary: Why young Americans are having less sex than ever before. Plus, how having a good time in the bedroom can help you in the boardroom.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Video.summary: Remember that sexy dream you had? We dish about what it means. Plus, picking the right condom for him and her. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Video.summary: Join Lisa Garr and her panel of guests, musician Chris Pierce, technology expert Moses Ma, and internationally noted biochemist Fred Brown. Today they talk about the science behind vaccines as well as “United We Rise,” a new collaborative song which honors the more than 300,000 lives lost during the pandemic.
Video.title: The Aware Show - United We Rise

Image.alt: The Aware Show - United We Rise
The Aware Show - United We Rise
The Aware Show - United We Rise

Video.summary: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about the true meaning behind loneliness and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving!
Video.title: The Aware Show - Reframing Loneliness

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Reframing Loneliness
The Aware Show - Reframing Loneliness
The Aware Show - Reframing Loneliness

Video.summary: Today Lisa talks with best-selling author and coach Christy Whitman about how to manifest your dreams. Her upcoming book is “The Desire Factor: How to Embrace Your Materialistic Nature to Reclaim Your Full Spiritual Power.” Christy shares proven methods for bringing your desires into your life. Info: christywhitman.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires
The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires
The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires

Video.summary: Can one truly understand loss? Senior Rabbi Steve Leder has presided over thousands of funerals, but it was the death of his own father that initiated a deeper understanding of grief. Today he discusses how the “moments” matter most. His new book is The Beauty of What Remains. Info: steveleder.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - The Beauty in Grief

Image.alt: The Aware Show - The Beauty in Grief
The Aware Show - The Beauty in Grief
The Aware Show - The Beauty in Grief

Video.summary: Dr. Heather Browne is a master at transforming conversations between couples. She shares how she helps couples bridge divides and cultivate more fulfilling relationships. Plus, we are back in India chatting with some cute kids and sharing good news.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart

Video.summary: Hollywood star, Sean Kanan, helps you unleash your inner warrior and change your life with his new book. We head to Rochester, NY, for a party that has been 46 years in the making. And we go international with inspiring conversations from India and Italy!
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: Dawa explores whether your mind controls you or you control your mind, as well as, how mindfulness can erase negative thinking and bad habits.

Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips

Video.summary: To be successful you have to take risks. Sometimes the biggest risk is letting go and becoming someone new. There will only be one winner - but everyone’s life will be transformed. Ready to find out the Season 2 WINNER?
Video.title: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5

Image.alt: Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5
Play To Win Season 2- Episode 5

Video.summary: Emily Bennett Taylor and her husband Miles were newlyweds with a bright future planned. Just as they were house hunting and talking about raising a family Emily received the news that she had stage 4 lung cancer. She and her husband recall their cancer journey and recount their determination to live life to its fullest while fighting for the chance to have children despite a grave cancer diagnosis.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5

Video.summary: Life can be full of hope and dreams. Lisa Briggs was enjoying a successful business, and a close-knit family while celebrating the arrival of her second child. Yet within months of giving birth Lisa was told the devastating news; she had stage 4 lung cancer. For an athletic, young woman who never smoked, the diagnosis seemed unreal. After the shock wore off, Lisa went into full action ahead as her will to live proved stronger than her devastating cancer.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6

Video.summary: Daymara had big plans in 2020. Trips, work goals, and family outings were a few items on Daymara's to-do list. But when she collapsed getting out of bed one morning, all those plans on the horizon were immediately put on hold. After being rushed to the hospital Daymara was faced with an unexpected diagnosis. She had acute myeloid leukemia, a type of blood cancer. As this type of Leukemia can be aggressive, Daymara immediately began an intensive chemotherapy regime and a groundbreaking stem cell procedure that would eventually save her life. This stem cell procedure however would force her into isolation as her immune system was weakened. Regardless of what may have seemed like an insurmountable challenge, Daymara persevered and her determination to leave the hospital so she could be with her children again is what Daymara says gave her hope and the ability to get well again.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E1

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E1
Hope Is Here S2E1
Hope Is Here S2E1

Video.summary: Early on in Rachel Collin's pregnancy, she was told there was a concern for her unborn child as doctors discovered her baby's heart was undeveloped. Soon hopes were dashed and worry set in as Rachel was told the future was uncertain for her baby boy. Hope is Here chronicles the first two years of Mikey Collins' life, who proved to be a brave little boy with an incredible will to live.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E2

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E2
Hope Is Here S2E2
Hope Is Here S2E2

Video.summary: Five decades ago, Lawrence Monk Terry was at the top of his game. In 1972 he won a silver medal with the U.S. rowing team at the 1972 Summer Olympics in Munich Germany. His position on the team was an important one. He served as the Stroke. That's the term for the one who sets the pace for the rest of the rowers. Since then, his life has been rowing along merrily. Just recently he was a fit and active retiree until an April day, after Monk was doing housework and decided it was time to come inside that his life would take a pause. What happened next would give a whole new meaning to his revered rowing position, The Stroke.
Video.title: Hope Is Here S2E3

Image.alt: Hope Is Here S2E3
Hope Is Here S2E3
Hope Is Here S2E3

Video.summary: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Video.summary: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.
Video.title: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Image.alt: Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone
Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone
Relationships: The Innocence in Everyone

Video.summary: In this lesson, we'll discover the significance of holy relationships. After all, souls are brought together for the purpose of enlightenment.
Video.title: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Image.alt: Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships
Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships
Relationships: Special and Holy Relationships

Video.summary: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.
Video.title: The Highest Pass

Image.alt: The Highest Pass
The Highest Pass

Video.summary: The Mark Morris Dance Group works with Parkinson's patients.
Video.title: Capturing Grace

Image.alt: Capturing Grace
Capturing Grace
